descFull: This Python application is an OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) tool called "Ominis OSINT - Web Hunter." It performs online information gathering by querying Google for search results related to a user-inputted query. The tool extracts relevant information such as titles, URLs, and potential mentions of the query in the results.
